error_signature: authentication failure with Google Business Messages API
title: Authentication failure with Google Business Messages API
symptom: Users encounter authentication issues when trying to connect to the Google Business Messages API using the HTTP Request node in n8n.
root_cause: The Google Business Messages API requires a specific authentication method using a service account, which differs from the standard OAuth2 flow. If the correct credentials and scopes are not provided, authentication will fail.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings in n8n.
Select 'Google Service Account API' as the Credential Type.
Enter the service account email and private key.
agent_instruction: Configure the HTTP Request node with the Google Service Account API credentials and the correct OAuth2 scope.
